title: Freelook++
description: Enhanced freelook mod with improved camera controls and features for better gameplay experience.
body:
# Freelook++ - Enhanced Camera Controls

**Enhanced freelook mod with improved camera controls and features for better gameplay experience.**

## Features

- **Hold to Freelook**: Hold Left Alt to temporarily enable freelook mode
- **Toggle Freelook**: Press F6 to toggle freelook mode on/off
- **Perspective Toggle Control**: Configure what happens when you try to change perspective (F5) while freelook is toggled
- **Configurable Controls**: Customize key bindings in Options > Controls > Freelook++ category
- **Smooth Camera Movement**: Enhanced camera controls with configurable sensitivity
- **Client-Side Only**: No server-side dependencies required - works on any server!
- **Lightweight**: Minimal performance impact on your game

## Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| **Left Alt** (Hold) | Temporary freelook mode |
| **F6** | Toggle freelook mode |
| **F7** | Open configuration screen |

*Keys can be customized in the Controls menu!*

## Configuration Options

- **Mouse Sensitivity**: Adjust mouse sensitivity for freelook (0.1x to 3.0x)
- **Invert Y Axis**: Invert vertical mouse movement
- **Smooth Transition**: Enable smooth camera transitions
- **Auto Third Person**: Automatically switch to third person when freelook is enabled
- **Perspective Toggle Behavior**: Choose what happens when you press F5 while freelook is toggled:
  - **Do Nothing**: Ignore perspective toggle (default)
  - **Deactivate Freelook**: Turn off freelook when perspective is toggled

*Access the configuration screen by pressing F7 or through the Controls menu!*

**Note**: Perspective toggle behavior only affects toggled freelook (F6), not held freelook (Left Alt).

## Perfect for:

- **Building**: Look around while placing blocks
- **Exploring**: Check your surroundings safely
- **PvP**: Maintain awareness while moving
- **Screenshots**: Get the perfect angle

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download Freelook++ from this page
4. Place both mod files in your `.minecraft/mods` folder
5. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: Latest supported versions (updated regularly)
- **Fabric Loader**: Latest compatible version
- **Fabric API**: Required
- **Java**: 21+
- **Environment**: Client-side only
- **Server Compatibility**: Works on all servers

## Support

- **Bug Reports**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/BloodredX/FreelookPlusPlus/issues)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/BloodredX/FreelookPlusPlus)

## License

Open source under MIT License.

---

**Enjoy enhanced camera controls with Freelook++!**
